title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 478.018 - Associate judges, circuit court, compensation
text:
478.018.  Associate judges, circuit court, compensation. — Each associate circuit judge shall receive an annual salary of sixty-nine thousand seven hundred thirteen dollars plus any salary adjustment provided after August 28, 1990, pursuant to section 476.405.
(L. 1979 S.B. 431, A.L. 1982 S.B. 497, A.L. 1984 H.B. 1244, A.L. 1990 S.B. 567) 
Revisor's Note: Salary adjustment index is printed, as required by § 476.405, in Appendix D.
